scripts.check:quick: tsc && biome check . && node scripts/check-scripts.js && node scripts/check-ai-context.js && node scripts/check-ai-foundation.js && node scripts/verify-architecture.js
scripts.check: tsc && biome check . && vitest run --passWithNoTests && node scripts/check-scripts.js && node scripts/check-ai-context.js && node scripts/check-ai-foundation.js && node scripts/verify-architecture.js && vite build
scripts.check:all: npm run check && npm run test:scaffold && npm run check:tauri
scripts.check:tauri: cargo fmt --manifest-path src-tauri/Cargo.toml -- --check && cargo clippy --manifest-path src-tauri/Cargo.toml --all-targets -- -D warnings && cargo test --manifest-path src-tauri/Cargo.toml && cargo check --manifest-path src-tauri/Cargo.toml
